name: AirflowApi
description: This Test Connection validates the access against the Airflow REST API and basic metadata extraction of pipelines.

steps.name: CheckAccess
steps.description: Validate that we can connect to the Airflow REST API by fetching the version endpoint.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to connect to Airflow REST API, please validate the host URL and credentials.

steps.name: GetPipelines
steps.description: List DAGs available via the Airflow REST API.
steps.errorMessage: Failed to fetch DAGs from Airflow REST API, please validate the credentials or user permissions.
